channel.title: Pages on Zhuma's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Zhuma's Blog

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

I’m Zhuma. I’m not really interested in much—just a rather boring person.

Experience

  • 2023 - Present： Undergraduate student at HIT Shenzhen, Automation

About This Blog

This blog mainly shares my daily life, and occasionally some tech-related stuff (maybe 😂). The fundamental reason I built this blog is that I’ve always thought having a personal homepage is a cool thing. The immediate trigger was reading this article which inspired me 😂 (though I first saw it on HOA).

Note: This blog is primarily in Chinese. Some content may not be available in English.

Contact

  • GitHub：beilu-zhuma
  • Email：18755667356@163.com

Do not fear the infinity of truth — every inch of progress brings its own joy.
